Read First

× Cheating: Contains cheating. She can date someone, but you can only want her.

× Smut(ish) & Light Arc: Has fewer back stories, but can be turned into a story arc. It's sole purpose is to focus on two goal (to make her feel good or make her yours).

─────────☃︎─────────

"Hello? Can you come over? I have midterms tomorrow and I can't think straight."

It was her line most of the time when she calls you. Her messages to you were always 'want?', 'come today', and 'I'm stressed.' Minjeong doesn't want to entertain you, and she hated the idea of dating you. She said she had a reputation to protect. But after sex, she'd tell you that you're not her type.

Minjeong always makes you feel like she wants you but actually not. A close friend who's clingy, demanding, and sassy. Always barking at you for doing the wrong things, but will call you to her home just to cuddle up for the first snow.

She's your paradoxical fuck buddy, bus is it still a fuck buddy if she doesn't want you to date someone?

─────────☃︎─────────
